title: P15B repair SHA response
objective:
Run script:
"""
path = Path('governance/deno_webhook.js')
text = path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
old_helper = 'async function updateFileContents(pat, filePath, content, message, sha) { const encoded = btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(content))); const body = { message, content: encoded }; if (sha) body.sha = sha; const resp = await ghRequest(pat, "PUT", `/repos/${GITHUB_REPO}/contents/${filePath}`, body); return resp.status; } async function sendTelegram'
new_helper = 'async function updateFileContents(pat, filePath, content, message, sha) { const encoded = btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(content))); const body = { message, content: encoded }; if (sha) body.sha = sha; const resp = await ghRequest(pat, "PUT", `/repos/${GITHUB_REPO}/contents/${filePath}`, body); return resp.status; } async function updateFileContentsDetailed(pat, filePath, content, message, sha) { const encoded = btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(content))); const body = { message, content: encoded }; if (sha) body.sha = sha; const resp = await ghRequest(pat, "PUT", `/repos/${GITHUB_REPO}/contents/${filePath}`, body); let data = null; try { data = await resp.json(); } catch { data = null; } return { status: resp.status, commit_sha: data?.commit?.sha || null, data }; } async function sendTelegram'
if old_helper in text:
    text = text.replace(old_helper, new_helper, 1)
old_write = 'const writeStatus = await updateFileContents( pat, taskPath, JSON.stringify(taskObj, null, 2) + "\\n", `CODEX-TASK: create task trace=${traceId}`, sha ); if (writeStatus !== 200 && writeStatus !== 201)'
new_write = 'const writeResult = await updateFileContentsDetailed( pat, taskPath, JSON.stringify(taskObj, null, 2) + "\\n", `CODEX-TASK: create task trace=${traceId}`, sha ); const writeStatus = writeResult.status; const taskCommitSha = writeResult.commit_sha; if (writeStatus !== 200 && writeStatus !== 201)'
if old_write in text:
    text = text.replace(old_write, new_write, 1)
old_response = 'task_path: taskPath, task_write_status: writeStatus, workflow: "codex-runner.yml"'
new_response = 'task_path: taskPath, task_write_status: writeStatus, commit_sha: taskCommitSha, task_file_commit_sha: taskCommitSha, workflow: "codex-runner.yml"'
if old_response in text:
    text = text.replace(old_response, new_response, 1)
path.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(path))
state = Path('governance/state/P15B_FIX_CODEX_TASK_COMMIT_SHA_RESPONSE.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'P15B','trace_id':'p15b_fix_codex_task_commit_sha_response_repair','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'changed':'governance/deno_webhook.js','workflow_files_touched':False,'fix':'/codex-task now returns commit_sha and task_file_commit_sha from GitHub contents API response','next':'P15C codex-task commit_sha response evidence'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/P15B_FIX_CODEX_TASK_COMMIT_SHA_RESPONSE.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# P15B | Fix codex-task commit_sha response\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nPatched governance/deno_webhook.js so /codex-task can return commit_sha/task_file_commit_sha from the GitHub contents API response. Workflow lock respected: no .github/workflows files touched.\n\nNext: P15C codex-task commit_sha response evidence.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
if ctx.exists():
    ctx.write_text(ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8').rstrip() + '\n## P15B completed | 2026-06-04\nPatched governance/deno_webhook.js so /codex-task returns commit_sha/task_file_commit_sha from GitHub contents API response. Workflow lock respected. Next: P15C codex-task commit_sha response evidence.\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(ctx))
